status: FROZEN 2026-07-22 — human-signed-off (CreolePro). This list is now fixed; changing it requires regenerating assets across all kept checkpoints.
purpose: The ~10 fixed prompts run at EVERY Model-C checkpoint forever — the 'watch it learn Kreyòl' slider asset (Station 6) and a demoable base→chat transition (Station 2). Chosen for the EXHIBIT, not for the metrics. Once the human signs off, this list is frozen; regenerating slider assets for a changed list requires re-running all kept checkpoints, so it is a once-with-care decision (docs/phase-1.md E3, Risks).

constraints.probe_proverbs_excluded: The proverb slot uses probe proverb #31 'Lè chat pa la, rat pran kay.' — 0 training-corpus hits (corpus_v0.md contamination check). Probe proverbs remain excluded from all TRAINING data; their presence in this eval/exhibit prompt set is their intended use (exhibit_examples split).
constraints.style: Completion seeds — the base model is a text continuer, so each prompt is a stem the model completes greedily. After SFT the same stems become questions the model answers, which is the visible base→chat transition.

prompts.prompt: Bonjou! Kijan ou ye jodi a?

prompts.note: Probe proverb #31; gold continuation: 'rat pran kay.' Zero training-corpus hits.

prompts.prompt: Tradui an kreyòl: "Haiti became independent in 1804."
prompts.note: Gold ≈ 'Ayiti te vin endepandan an 1804.' Exercises the past marker te + number tokenization (1804 → 18·04 in kreyol-bpe) — connects the slider to Station 1.

prompts.prompt: An kreyòl, «I love my country very much» vle di:

prompts.note: Phrasing corrected to native form by the human signer.

prompts.prompt: Krik! Krak! Te gen yon fwa, yon ti gason yo te rele Ti Jan. Chak maten, li
prompts.note: Opens with the canonical Haitian storytelling call-and-response.

prompts.prompt: Ayiti se yon peyi ki gen yon istwa rich. Kilti li
Mesyedam, se yon gwo onè pou mwen prezante
Frè m, kite m di w yon bagay:
